seoTitle: Austinmer vs Austral Eden — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Austinmer and Austral Eden. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Austinmer vs Austral Eden: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Austinmer and Austral Eden.
heading: Austinmer vs Austral Eden — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Austinmer, New South Wales and Austral Eden, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Austinmer has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Austral Eden (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Austinmer or Austral Eden safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Austinmer has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Austral Eden scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Austinmer scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Austral Eden scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Austinmer or Austral Eden?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Austinmer has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
